item.title: DeFi protocols lose $35M in coordinated attacks: Verus bridge $7.5M, AFX exchange $24M, B2 Network $3.9M drained within hours
U.S. federal agencies miss GENIUS Act July 18 deadline to finalize stablecoin rules, leaving issuers in regulatory limbo
DTCC completes first live production trades of tokenized securities, covering Russell 1000 equities, ETFs, and U.S. Treasuries
SEC to propose rules this month on token offerings, broker-dealer custody, and crypto trading venues under 2026 regulatory agenda
EU officials move to revise MiCA to extend rules to non-EU stablecoin issuers in response to U.S. GENIUS Act framework
Wanchain bridge exploit drains 290M NIGHT tokens, sending price down 43%; Cardano's Hoskinson calls for industry ZK security overhaul
Citadel Securities invests $400M in Crypto.com at $20B valuation; firm to expand into tokenized securities and derivatives
U.S. and UK publish joint recommendations to align stablecoin and tokenization regulatory standards across jurisdictions
Robinhood Chain mainnet launches publicly, enabling tokenized stock trading across 120-plus countries on its Layer 2 blockchain
Ostium loses $18M to oracle manipulation attack where an exploiter submitted future-dated price reports to drain protocol vault
Dinari and tZERO launch joint turnkey platform for tokenized U.S. equities, bundling issuance, custody, and settlement for broker-dealers
Securitize tokenizes $295M of its own NYSE-listed stock on Solana and Avalanche on its first day as a public company
Cardano wallet platform SecondFi shuts down after software exploit drains 16.1M ADA ($2.4M) from 374 wallets
Aptos blockchain flaw disclosed by Hexens security firm could have put up to $70B in digital assets at systemic risk
U.S. House Financial Services Committee schedules July 17 CLARITY Act field hearing in New York as Senate floor vote remains unscheduled
